top_signals.title: Japan’s megabanks post record profits, but analysts warn growth may slow as risks mount
top_signals.summary: Japan's largest lenders may face some challenges to keep profit levels at record highs, amid higher credit costs and current geopolitical risks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tesla brings 'Full Self-Driving (Supervised)' to China after years of delays as local EV rivals race ahead
top_signals.summary: Tesla's 'Full Self-Driving (Supervised)' capabilities are now available in China, the company said in an X post on Thursday, after years of delays.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Codelco fires executive after audit points to 27-year output low
top_signals.summary: Production revisions and bonus recalculations deepen scrutiny of governance at the world's largest copper miner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
